analysis.reasoning: Core message: The tweet promotes the EU’s European Green Deal and the first European Climate Law as setting the goal of all climate action to protect people and the planet, quoting an EU Executive Vice-President. EU1: Not about historic success or learning from past mistakes; no. EU2: Does not emphasize unity among member states; no. EU3: It highlights protecting people (citizens) through climate action, implying usefulness to citizens via concrete EU policy (Climate Law/Green Deal); yes. EU4: Positions the EU as pioneering with the "first European Climate Law" and leading on climate action; strongly yes. EU5: Not about human rights/democracy advocacy; no. EU6: While climate action has global impact, the tweet frames EU internal policy rather than global contribution; insufficient to claim; no. Conclusion: EU3 and EU4 apply.
